career: Venus-Jupiter supports teaching, advising, finance, law, counseling, arts, publishing, education, ceremonies, and work combining wisdom with social grace.
relationships: Marriage, family growth, reconciliation, blessings from teachers, and supportive social circles are emphasized when both planets are well placed.
wealth: The subperiod can improve wealth through guidance, education, investments, patrons, marriage alliances, and ethical expansion.
caution: Excessive optimism, indulgence, or moral compromise can dilute otherwise auspicious results.
